_doc: Optional path / URL remap config. Copy this file to e.g. vesuvius-remap.json,
edit the entries, and point the VESUVIUS_REMAP_CONFIG env var at it (typically
via .envrc). When the env var is unset, no remappings are applied.
Whitelist atlas access roots by URL prefix (and optionally `usage`).
Each entry matches a URL prefix and optionally rewrites it. Omit `usage`
to match any usage. Omit `rewrite_to` to allow the URL through unchanged.
Map a volume id (as returned by VolumeReference::id) to a direct OME-zarr
URL. The GUI uses the override instead of the default tile layout.
